metadata.description: Speak Claude Code activity out loud while you're AFK — agent-callable speak_summary / speak_status / speak_blocker tools. Default TTS is edge-tts (free, online, bilingual, no API key).

plugins.name: readless
plugins.description: MCP-based voice plugin: the agent calls speak_summary at turn end, speak_status mid-task, and speak_blocker when stuck. Defaults to edge-tts (free, online, bilingual Chinese/English, no API key). OpenAI and ElevenLabs supported via opt-in extras + secure key entry. Run /readless:setup after install.
